name: PDU
title: PDU
syntax: PDU short <AUTOSAR short header ID> <PDU var>
PDU long <AUTOSAR long header ID> <PDU var>
description: Can be used to create a PDU object. The object data can be manipulated via the object's selectors. Additional object properties can be read from the selectors.
A PDU object can be sent using the TriggerPDU function.

parameters.name: <PDU var>
parameters.description: String that specifies the variable name of the object.

availability: CAN AUTOSAR PDUs Ethernet AUTOSAR PDUs (since version 9.0 SP3) FlexRay AUTOSAR PDUs (since version 9.0 SP3) AFDX FDS (since version 9.0 SP3)
